title: Creamy Mc
description: Every keyboard press plays a short keyboard-click sound, with multiple built-in variants chosen randomly. Mouse button clicks also play their own click sound. The mod includes an in-game sound settings screen, opened with O,
body:
Creamy Mc adds satisfying click sounds to your Minecraft client.

Every keyboard press plays a short keyboard click sound, and mouse button clicks play their own mouse click sound. Keyboard clicks include multiple built-in variants that are chosen randomly, giving the mod a more natural and less repetitive feel.

The mod also includes an in-game sound settings menu, opened with `O`, where you can import your own keyboard or mouse click sounds. Custom sounds can be loaded from `.ogg`, `.mp3`, or `.wav` files.

This is a client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.11.
